title: 7 Herbal Creams For Hot Flashes
description: Vitex agnus-castus creams contains iridoids, flavonoids, and phenolic acids as its bioactive constituents. These compounds work together to help regulate hormonal balance in the body, which is often disrupted in women experiencing hot flashes. Iridoids, specifically aucubin and agnuside, have been shown to influence the hypothalamic-pituitary-adrenal axis, helping to normalize estrogen levels and reduce the frequency and severity of hot flashes. Flavonoids like kaempferol and quercetin...
